name: @tootallnate/acb
description: Parser for CRI Middleware's ACB (Audio Cue Bank) format. ACB is a UTF-table descriptor that names + sequences the audio waveforms packed in a companion AWB. Exposes the cue name <-> AWB track id mapping so consumers can give bank tracks meaningful filenames (e.g. `BGM_Boss.wav` instead of `track_007.hca`).
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
